name: Simple baseline refactor, threshold changes
long_description:
SEED = 42
EPOCHS = 50
BATCH_SIZE = 128
NUM_WORKERS = 4
PREFETCH_FACTOR = 2
DEVICE = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
AMP_DTYPE = torch.bfloat16
USE_AMP = DEVICE.type == "cuda"

MODEL_CONFIG = {
    "architecture": "baseline",
    "input_dim": 2560,
    "model_dim": 512,
    "num_layers": 1,
    "num_heads": 8,
    "feedforward_dim": 2048,
    "dropout": 0.1,
    "num_classes": 6,
    "max_response_length": 512,
}

LEARNING_RATE = 3e-4
WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-2
MAX_GRAD_NORM = 1.0
CLASS_WEIGHTS = [1.0, 2.5, 3.7, 10.0, 8.0, 5.9]
SCHEDULER_FACTOR = 0.5
SCHEDULER_PATIENCE = 2
MIN_LEARNING_RATE = 1e-6
EARLY_STOPPING_PATIENCE = 20
MIN_IMPROVEMENT = 1e-4
